name: Fettuccine with Red Clam Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy medium skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté until golden brown, about 1 minute.
3. Add the tomato paste and stir for 1 minute.
4. Pour in the clam juice and reserve half of the juice from the clams. Stir to combine.
5. Simmer the sauce until slightly thickened, about 15 minutes.
6. Add the chopped clams and red pepper flakes to the sauce. Heat through.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Pour the sauce over the cooked fettuccine and toss thoroughly.
9. Serve hot.
